description: A hierarchical list of items and nested folders. Supports keyboard navigation, optional multi-select with cascading folder checkboxes, optional drag-and-drop reordering, and an active-item state for navigation use cases.
instructions: Compose with Tree.Root wrapping Tree.Item leaves and Tree.Folder nodes. Each item and folder needs a stable `id` and a `label`. Pass `multiSelect` to render checkboxes and cascade selection across folders, and `reorderable` to enable drag-and-drop. State is controlled: render from the latest `TreeChangeState` and persist it from `onChange`. Use `isActive` to highlight the current item when the Tree drives navigation.
name: Tree
